Triggering the system-level street shop deconstruction and '0-employee home appliance/mobile phone/hardware & building materials grocery store' physical dimensionality reduction probe. The illusory Apple consumer electronics foundry template in the original data has been physically and completely written off. This enterprise, named 'Shitong Electrical Appliances', because its name contains the word 'Electrical Appliances', was mechanically and rigidly pulled into the camp of 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing' by the official system (and even labeled as a small enterprise). However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted a fatal contrast on its chassis: the number of insured employees is an absolute 0! The paid-in capital is only 600,000. Even more devastating are its extremely down-to-earth spatial coordinates: 'No. 137 Xinling Road, Lukou Street'. The logical deduction instantly turned into a street scene full of earthly market vibes: in a street-facing shop in the remote suburb of Lukou Street, Nanjing, a boss who hasn't hired even 1 assembly line worker, holding 600,000 in purchasing funds, claims to have built an 'electrical machinery manufacturing plant'? The probe mercilessly deleted the 'manufacturing' illusion granted by the authorities, extracting the long string of pure sales businesses in its license: 'sales of household appliances, mobile phone products, hardware and electrical equipment, building materials, furniture products, and daily necessities'. The truth is extremely naked and grounded: this is a 100% pure '0-Employee Street-Side Appliance & Hardware Retail Store'. The boss simply opened a storefront on Xinling Road, selling mobile phones and rice cookers in the front, piling cement and hardware accessories in the back, and conveniently helping nearby residents install monitors or deal with computer software. The official 'electrical manufacturing entity' label is the most outrageous elevation and misinterpretation of this most grassroots street-side grocery retail ecology.
